title: Over 93,000 posts vacant in CAPFs: govt. tells Rajya Sabha
description: The Central Industrial Security Force (CISF) has the highest number of 28,342 vacant posts followed by the Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) with 27,400 vacancies; MoS Home says govt. has reduced the time taken for medical examinations and lowered cut-off marks for shortlisting candidates in categories facing shortfalls to ensure adequate recruitment
